name: icra-skills
description: Depth pack for ICRA robotics-paper planning, PaperPlaza submission, video attachments, real-robot evidence, the RA-L presentation pathway, and IEEE Xplore camera-ready work.

plugins.name: icra-skills
plugins.description: Twelve ICRA-specific skills covering robotics venue routing (direct ICRA vs RA-L with conference presentation), PaperPlaza mechanics, the 6+2 page rule, video attachments, real-robot experiment standards, and IEEE camera-ready publication, anchored to the verified ICRA 2026 cycle and announced ICRA 2027 pages.
